headlines.headline: Jorvyl Securities reports 10% increase in customer acquisition

sentiment.reasoning: A 10% increase in customer acquisition directly signals revenue growth potential and improved market share.

headlines.headline: Ilval Financial faces regulatory review of automated logistics practices

sentiment.reasoning: Regulatory reviews introduce operational uncertainty and potential legal or compliance costs that could disrupt business processes.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
